summary: ISS-1868 / WIN-036 defense_survives=3 (curmudgeon c3 advocate) — three-pronged defender argument that (1) dome trajectory model was fit and committed before WMM2025 publication, (2) 18° threshold is structurally bound to that trajectory, (3) OTS at minimum proves the threshold parameter existed at registration. EXP-291 narrows scope to prong 1 (the steel-manned independent-trajectory claim) using the curmudgeon’s own preemptive recommendation: insert one sentence into WIN-036 detail_evidence between “…not independent predictions.” and “No derivation connects…” reading: "Both NOAA’s WMM2025 secular-variation forecast and the dome’s purported exponential trajectory are fits to the same public NOAA NP.xy time series; they have not been shown to make distinguishable predictions at any future epoch." Patch type: detail_evidence_sentence_insertion (single-sentence, byte-exact replacement_detail_evidence string supplied; +229 chars). Out of scope and noted in EXP-291 integration_notes for separate work: c3 major hole #1 (cross-WIN OTS-canary phrasing harmonisation across WIN-035/036/037/038/039 + Timestamp Error tab — needs dedicated cross-WIN EXP), c3 moderate hole #2 (WIN-007 code_analysis.relabels_standard tag flip false→true — mechanical tag fix), c3 minor hole #5 (use 19.298° not 19.3° to preserve the 1.298° margin — separate minor-edit pass). Recommend the decider apply the patch, close ISS-1868, and queue WIN-036 for curmudgeon cycle 4 with the expectation defense_survives drops 3 → 1 or 2.
